user_query: List SmartSales approbation statuses, then get the full details of the first one.

plan.query: List SmartSales approbation statuses, then get the full details of the first one.
plan.reasoning: First, I need to retrieve the list of approbation statuses from SmartSales. After obtaining this list, I will get the full details of the first approbation status. The two steps can run serially because the second step depends on the output of the first.

steps.task: Retrieve the list of SmartSales approbation statuses.
Get the full details of the first approbation status from the previously retrieved list.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results from step 2 to provide the final answer.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve the list of SmartSales approbation statuses.
